user.title: Set up UniFi Protect Sensors
user.description: Enter your UniFi Protect console details. Use an API key (recommended) or a local user account — Ubiquiti cloud/SSO accounts are not supported.

data_description.api_key: Generate in the Protect web UI under System → API Keys. Leave blank to use username/password instead.
data_description.verify_ssl: Enable only if your console has a valid TLS certificate. Most UniFi devices use self-signed certificates.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the UniFi Protect console. Check the host, port, and SSL setting.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Verify the key in the Protect console under System → API Keys.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs for details.

data_description.verify_ssl: Enable only if your console has a valid TLS certificate.
